sources._source_aggregation: IEC 60909-0:2016 §3.3.2 — declared PSCC at HV primary back-calculates ZQ; single-source utility-only contribution at every cascade node.

cascade.calculation_basis: Single-phase TN L-N fault per IEC 60909-0:2016 §6: Ik1 = c·U₀/(2·Z_S). DNO declared PSCC 1.5 kA at CU-G (service head) is binding per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 313.1; TX-1 (upstream of CU-G by 5m of 25mm² Cu PVC, |Z_cable| ≈ √(0.004² + 0.0005²) = 0.00403 Ω) back-calculated: Z_TX-1 = Z_CU-G − Z_cable = 0.0805 − 0.00403 = 0.07647 Ω. Ik_max = 1.05·230/(2·0.07647) = 1.579 kA per c_max LV (IEC 60909-0:2016 Table 1).
DNO-declared PSCC anchor (1.5 kA) per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 313.1.1; Z_CU-G back-calculated single-phase: Z = c·U₀/(2·Ik) = 1.05·230/(2·1500) = 0.0805 Ω per IEC 60909-0:2016 §6.
Internal CU busbar copper trunk impedance ≈ negligible; monotonic increment from CU-G (0.0805 → 0.0810 Ω). Ik_max = 1.05·230/(2·0.0810) = 1.491 kA per IEC 60909-0:2016 §6.

Single-phase TN L-N fault per IEC 60909-0:2016 §6: z_total = upstream busbar z + cable magnitude = 0.0810 + √(0.22² + 0.004²) = 0.0810 + 0.2200 = 0.3010 Ω. Cable R from BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4 Table 4D5 (1.5mm² Cu PVC); X from Appendix 4 Table 4F. Ik_max = 1.05·230/(2·0.3010) = 0.401 kA. Note: previous stored Ik 0.85 kA was physically inconsistent with cable impedance (z-Ik reconciliation failure flagged by Sprint B H3).

Single-phase TN L-N fault per IEC 60909-0:2016 §6: z_total = upstream busbar z + cable magnitude = 0.0810 + √(0.281² + 0.009²) = 0.0810 + 0.2811 = 0.3621 Ω (ring approximated as radial worst-case for cascade Ik"; tight ring would halve cable resistance per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 15). Cable R from Appendix 4 Table 4D5 (2.5mm² Cu PVC); X from Appendix 4 Table 4F. Ik_max = 1.05·230/(2·0.3621) = 0.334 kA.

selectivity_implications.recommendation: BS 1361 Type II service fuse 100A Icn 33 kA — adequate at 1.579 kA cascade (≥20× margin)
Main switch — Ifault 1.50 kA well within 6 kA rating
6 kA MCB adequate at 0.401 kA cascade (15× margin; H3 fix May 2026: Ik recomputed from physical z = upstream + cable per IEC 60909-0:2016 §6 single-phase formula)

assumptions: DNO declared PSCC 1.5 kA at CU-G (service head) per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 313.1.1 — binding boundary; TX-1 back-calculated upstream.
Single-phase TN L-N fault formula Ik1 = c·U₀/(2·Z_S) per IEC 60909-0:2016 §6 with c_max = 1.05 (LV, Table 1).

Transformer Zpu 4% assumed (no nameplate provided) per IEC60909/transformer-zpu-table.json default for 500 kVA — used only for downstream sanity check; cascade is anchored on the DNO declaration per Reg 313.1.
Cable impedance per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4 Tables 4D5 (R) + 4F (X); magnitude added arithmetically to upstream z per skill convention (matches uk-commercial-3storey).
Sprint B H3 fix May 2026: every node's z_total and ifault_ka_max now reconcile to the single-phase formula within 1% (was previously non-reconciling scaffolding).
tool_call_pending: true on all nodes — calc.iec60909_cascade runtime not yet available.

rationale.chat_summary: UK 3-bed semi on 500 kVA DNO TX with declared PSCC 1.5 kA at CU-G (service head, BS 7671 Reg 313.1 binding). 5-node cascade (TX → CU → 2 final circuits). H3 fix May 2026: every node's z_total and ifault_ka_max reconcile to single-phase IEC 60909-0:2016 §6 formula Ik = c·U₀/(2·Z_S) within 1% (c_max=1.05 LV per Table 1). Cable impedance summed from upstream Z + |Z_cable| per BS 7671 Appendix 4 tables. All Ifault within standard MCB Icn 6 kA. tool_call_pending until calc.iec60909_cascade runs.

sections.title: Source Specification
sections.summary: Single utility source. 500 kVA distribution TX. Zpu 4% assumed (IEC 60909-2 default).

sections.title: HV-side Assumptions
sections.summary: N/A — no HV side present (LV-fed service).

sections.title: Transformer + Source Impedances
sections.summary: DNO declared PSCC 1.5 kA at CU-G (service head) per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 313.1.1 is binding. Z_CU-G back-calculated single-phase: Z = c·U₀/(2·Ik) = 1.05·230/(2·1500) = 0.0805 Ω per IEC 60909-0:2016 §6. TX-1 upstream by 5m of 25mm² Cu PVC: |Z_cable| = √(0.004² + 0.0005²) ≈ 0.00403 Ω → Z_TX-1 = 0.0805 − 0.00403 = 0.07647 Ω. X/R = 5 (engineer value).

decisions.label: DNO declaration binding at CU-G
decisions.summary: Single-phase TN: Ik1 = c·U₀/(2·Z_S). 1.5 kA at CU-G anchors cascade; TX-1 back-calculated.
decisions.rule: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 313.1.1 + IEC 60909-0:2016 §6 single-phase TN fault

sections.title: Motor Contribution Assessment
sections.summary: Motor load 0 kW → no motor contribution. Threshold ≥ 1% not met.

sections.title: Per-node Ifault Computation
sections.summary: Ik"max range 0.334-1.579 kA across cascade. ipk range 0.48-3.48 kA. Every node reconciles to Ik = c·U₀/(2·Z_S) within 1% per validator INV-11 (single-phase TN formula, c_max=1.05 LV per IEC 60909-0:2016 Table 1). H3 fix May 2026: final-circuit Ik recomputed from physical z_total = upstream + cable (was stored at non-reconciling values).

decisions.label: Internal-consistency reconciliation
decisions.summary: Every node Ik = c·U₀/(2·Z_S) within 1% (single-phase TN per IEC 60909-0:2016 §6).

decisions.label: tool_call_pending across all nodes
decisions.summary: calc.iec60909_cascade runtime not yet available; engineer-input PSCC + cable tables used as fallback.

sections.title: Selectivity Implications
sections.summary: All breakers in cascade adequate at their installation Ifault. DNO 100A fuse Icn 33 kA, CU MCBs Icn 6 kA.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: Compliant. Single TOOL-CALL-PENDING flag for deferred cascade tool.

invariants.evidence: Breaking-capacity verdicts on 3 cascade nodes (CU-G/CU-G-MAINSW Ik3=1.5 vs Icu=6.0 headroom=300.0% ok; CU-G.BUSBAR/CU-G-BUSBAR-DEV Ik3=1.49 vs Icu=6.0 headroom=302.5% ok; CU-G.C01/CU-G-C01-MCB-B32 Ik3=0.40 vs Icu=6.0 headroom=1395.51% ok). Rule 1: all reconcile to single-phase ifault_ka_max per TN L-N formula (single-source domestic supply). Rule 2: headroom arithmetic within 0.5%. Rule 3: all ≥ 10% → 'ok'. Rule 4: 'engineer_declared' consistent. Rule 5: ratings present and >0.

Single-source utility-only example: every cascade node carries superposition_contribution_ka with single key 'utility_utility-DNO' equal to ifault_ka_max and total reconciling to ifault_ka_max within 0% (degenerate single-source case per IEC 60909-0:2016 §4.5). Cross-walk verified: sources[utility-DNO].contributes_to_nodes keys match cascade[*].node_id where ifault_ka_max present.
